Help Center / Map Guides / Heikai-jima Map Guide

🎯 Map Overview

Heikai-jima is a four-track urban station with passing loops that let express trains overtake locals. There are no turnaround operations — trains simply pass through or stop along the main line. This simpler layout makes it a good starting point for new players.

  • Tracks: Track 1 / Track 2 / Track 3 / Track 4
  • Passing loops: Yes (used for express overtakes)

🗺 Lever Layout

Use the diagram above to see how Start Levers, End Levers, and tracks are arranged in the station.

🔧 Route List

A route is defined by a Start Lever and an End Lever. For example, route 1A is opened by Start Lever "1" and End Lever "A".

All routes at Heikai-jima are main-line routes (no shunting routes). Start levers light up yellow.

RouteStart → EndPurpose
1A1 → AEntry from the outbound main line into Track 1
1B1 → BEntry from the outbound main line into Track 2
2C2 → CDeparture from Track 1 onto the outbound main line
3C3 → CDeparture from Track 2 onto the outbound main line
4D4 → DEntry from the inbound main line into Track 3
4E4 → EEntry from the inbound main line into Track 4
5F5 → FDeparture from Track 3 onto the inbound main line
6F6 → FDeparture from Track 4 onto the inbound main line
